prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: main menu UI chrome component sheet for Matchatro/Orbwalker
Primary request: produce a 1536x1024 opaque chroma-key source sprite sheet with separated main-menu UI components only.
Scene/backdrop: perfectly flat solid background color #FF00FF only, edge to edge, no variation.
Subject: one large hero frame, one wide primary button frame, one wide secondary button frame, one medium stats/info panel frame, and six circular medallion icon frames for profile, settings, achievements, relic/chest, mastery, and best-run.
Style/medium: polished stylized 2D fantasy UI, dark stone and blackened steel with antique gold trim, subtle cyan jewel accents.
Composition/framing: organized component sheet, components not touching each other, generous spacing, straight alignment rows, clean silhouette separation.
Materials/textures: intentional interior fills only (dark stone, carved slate, muted parchment insert where appropriate), never placeholder magenta fills.
Constraints: no text, no labels, no logo, no watermark, no checkerboard, no gradient background, no textured background, no shadow or glow touching background, no particles or smoke, no #FF00FF inside any UI component.
Avoid: magenta or near-magenta hues inside components; cluttered overlap; cropped components.
notes: Opaque chroma-key fallback source candidate only; deterministic keyed-alpha extraction required before promotion.
